<answer>After April 2011, Oman signed formal agreements with: Qatar (May 12, 2011), Iran (multiple times: May 12, 2011; September 17, 2012; August 27-28, 2013; September 17, 2013; March 12-13, 2014), South Africa (March 14, 2012), South Korea (April 17, 2012), Mehr News Agency (October 30, 2012), and Vietnam (January 23-24, 2013).</answer>
